title: WidgetMessage
description: Synthetic dispatch message — drives a widget worker to start a unit of work. Mirrors the structure of a typical engine-worker contract: header envelope, identifier, type discriminator, tenant routing, and a small parameter list.

widgetType.description: Open enum for the worker family (e.g. 'Trim', 'Polish').

tenant.description: Tenant identifier; doubles as a routing-key segment.

parameters.description: Optional name/value parameters consumed by the worker.
